name: You vs... You?
description:
You were sent to fight entities, because you wanted to and you were bored 👍.

Even got a winstreak of fights! You thought to yourself why didn't you fought people with the same power as you? And of course, got sent to a portal where you fell to a island of an alternate universe, or dimension.

Bro, Jesus is ballin, he's levitating and will get the Devil dunked on by him, this is so epic 😭😭

So yeah, scenario is: you're in an island of another alternate dimension where it's only purpose it to welcome fights. And when it's the end of it, it repairs itself.

Absolute Mirror:
creator: Sasshhi
